};

const tmpPath = '/tmp/gh-aw/aw_info.json';
fs.writeFileSync(tmpPath, JSON.stringify(awInfo, null, 2));
console.log('Generated aw_info.json at:', tmpPath);
console.log(JSON.stringify(awInfo, null, 2));

// Set model as output for reuse in other steps/jobs
core.setOutput('model', awInfo.model);

2026-02-25T22:03:55.3797768Z The PR has been created. Here's a summary of all the inconsistencies found and fixed:
2026-02-25T22:03:55.3799071Z 
2026-02-25T22:03:55.3799426Z ## Summary of Changes
2026-02-25T22:03:55.3799585Z 
2026-02-25T22:03:55.6093419Z Reviewed all 21 markdown files in `documentation/` and found 5 files with issues:
2026-02-25T22:03:55.6094193Z 
2026-02-25T22:03:56.0662153Z ### 1. `Quickstart-on-how-to-write-tests.md` — Outdated mocha/chai test patterns
2026-02-25T22:03:56.4104210Z The code examples still showed the old mocha+chai testing approach. The repo now uses **vitest** exclusively:
2026-02-25T22:03:56.6979108Z - `import { assert } from "chai"` → `import { ..., assert, ... } from "vitest"`
2026-02-25T22:03:57.1539833Z - `import { Context } from "mocha"` → `import type { TestInfo } from "@azure-tools/test-recorder"`
2026-02-25T22:03:57.1541837Z - `context: Context` → `context: TestInfo`
2026-02-25T22:03:57.2113274Z - `new Recorder(context.currentTest)` → `new Recorder(context)`
2026-02-25T22:03:57.6994342Z - `beforeEach(async function (this: Context) {` → `beforeEach(async (ctx) => {`
2026-02-25T22:03:57.6994753Z 
2026-02-25T22:03:57.9953774Z ### 2. `Generate-code-from-TypeSpec.md` — Wrong pnpm package name
2026-02-25T22:03:58.2821100Z - `npm install -g @pnpm` → `npm install -g pnpm` (pnpm's npm package name has no `@` prefix)
2026-02-25T22:03:58.2821679Z 
2026-02-25T22:03:58.5694373Z ### 3. `steps-after-generations.md` — Invalid dev-tool install command
2026-02-25T22:03:59.0867787Z - Removed `npm install -g common/tools/dev-tool` — this passes a local path as a package name, which fails. `dev-tool` is already available via `npx dev-tool` as a devDependency.
2026-02-25T22:03:59.0868598Z 
2026-02-25T22:03:59.3162192Z ### 4. `RLC-Swagger-quickstart.md` — Same invalid dev-tool install command
2026-02-25T22:03:59.3737892Z - Same fix as above.
2026-02-25T22:03:59.3738137Z 
2026-02-25T22:03:59.5465369Z ### 5. `resolve-pnpm-lock-merge-conflict.md` — Missing `/` in shell command
2026-02-25T22:04:00.0028673Z - `git add \`git rev-parse --show-toplevel\`pnpm-lock.yaml` → added missing `/` before `pnpm-lock.yaml`
2026-02-25T22:04:00.0029175Z

This reflects status of builds and checks.\n 4. get_files - Get the list of files changed in a pull request. Use with pagination parameters to control the number of results returned.\n 5. get_review_comments - Get review threads on a pull request. Each thread contains logically grouped review comments made on the same code location during pull request reviews. 2026-02-25T22:04:16.4370420Z {"timestamp":"2026-02-25T22:03:51.898002133Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"safeoutputs","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"body":"This PR fixes several inconsistencies found while reviewing the `documentation/` folder against the current source code and tooling.\n\n## Changes\n\n### `documentation/Quickstart-on-how-to-write-tests.md`\nThe test code examples were using outdated **mocha** and **chai** patterns. All SDK tests now use **vitest**:\n- Replaced `import { assert } from \"chai\"` with `import { describe, it, assert, beforeEach, afterEach } from \"vitest\"`\n- Removed `import { Context } from \"mocha\"` — replaced with `import type { TestInfo } from \"@azure-tools/test-recorder\"`\n- Updated `createRecorder` function signature from `context: Context` to `context: TestInfo`\n- Replaced `new Recorder(context.currentTest)` with `new Recorder(context)` (vitest passes the test context directly, not wrapped in `.currentTest`)\n- Updated `beforeEach`/`afterEach` callbacks from `async function (this: Context)` to arrow functions with a `ctx` parameter\n- Replaced mocha-style `this.currentTest` / `createRecorder(this)` with `createRecorder(ctx)`\n\nThis aligns the examples with how tests are actually written today, e.g. `sdk/purview/purview-datamap-rest/test/public/`.\n\n### `documentation/Generate-code-from-TypeSpec.md`\n- Fixed `npm install -g @pnpm` → `npm install -g pnpm`. The package name on npm is `pnpm`, not `@pnpm` (no `@` prefix).\n\n### `documentation/steps-after-generations.md`\n- Removed `npm install -g common/tools/dev-tool` which is an invalid command — it passes a local relative path as a package name. The `dev-tool` binary is already available via `npx dev-tool` as it is a `devDependency` in SDK packages.\n\n### `documentation/RLC-Swagger-quickstart.md`\n- Same fix as `steps-after-generations.md`: removed the invalid `npm install -g common/tools/dev-tool` line.\n\n### `documentation/resolve-pnpm-lock-merge-conflict.md`\n- Fixed a missing path separator `/` in the combined shell command:  \n  `git add \\`git rev-parse --show-toplevel\\`pnpm-lock.yaml` → `git add \\`git rev-parse --show-toplevel\\`/pnpm-lock.yaml`  \n  Without the `/`, the path was concatenated incorrectly (e.g., `/home/user/azure-sdk-for-jspnpm-lock.yaml`).\n","branch":"docs/fix-documentation-inconsistencies","title":"Fix documentation inconsistencies in documentation/ folder"},"name":"create_pull_request"}}}

2026-02-25T22:04:16.4804769Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-02-25T22:04:16.4804922Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-02-25T22:04:16.4805129Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-02-25T22:04:16.4805476Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-02-25T22:04:16.4805591Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-02-25T22:04:16.4805731Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-02-25T22:04:16.4805813Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-02-25T22:04:16.4806014Z [36;1m  echo 'AWF binary not installed, skipping firewall log summary'[0m
2026-02-25T22:04:16.4806088Z [36;1mfi[0m
